showFloatingHelpersPanel: Parādīt peldošo palīgu paneli pie OpenFront
Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront: Parādīt peldošo palīgu paneli pie OpenFront
If openfront.io was already open when yo: Ja openfront.io jau bija atvērts, kad uzinstalējāt šo paplašinājumu, pārlādējiet šo cilni vienu reizi. Pretējā gadījumā pagarinājums neiedarbosies šajā cilnē.
Adds a red marker to nation AI names on: Pievieno sarkanu marķieri valsts MI nosaukumiem kartē.
Pievieno sarkanu marķieri tautas MI nosaukumiem.
Highlights allies with remaining allianc: Izceļ sabiedrotos ar atlikušo alianses laiku.
Lūdzu, izmantojiet tikai solo vai pielāgotas spēles.
Shows predicted enemy nuke landing point: Parāda prognozētos ienaidnieka nuke nosēšanās punktus un sprādziena rādiusu.
Parāda prognozētos ienaidnieka nuke nosēšanās punktus un sprādziena rādiusu.
Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = t: Parāda ienaidnieka laivu nosēšanās punktus. Sarkans = mērķtiecīgs jūs, dzeltens = mērķtiecīgs citiem.
Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom: Pamest ienaidnieku, lai parādītu augstas bojājumu atomu un ūdeņraža mērķus.
Adds auto economy and population nuke ac: Pievieno auto ekonomiku un iedzīvotāju nuke darbības spēlētāja ritenim.
Also show auto nuke options when right-c: Rādīt arī auto nuke iespējas, kad ar peles labo klikšķi sabiedroto spēlētājiem.
Team games only: blocks trades with play: Komandas spēles tikai: bloki tirgojas ar spēlētājiem, kuri nav jūsu komandā.
Blocks trades with players who are not o: Bloki tirgojas ar spēlētājiem, kuri nav jūsu komandā.
Available only during an active team gam: Pieejams tikai aktīvas komandas spēles laikā.
Lists each team's total GPM in team game: Saraksta katras komandas kopējo GPM komandas spēlēs.
Shows observed ship and train trade impo: Parāda novēroto kuģu un vilcienu tirdzniecības importu un eksportu.
Highlights structures with observed trad: Izcelt struktūras ar novērotajiem tirdzniecības ieņēmumiem.
Hover a player to highlight the partner: Uzstājiet spēlētāju, lai izceltu partnernozari, kas veicina to eksportu.
Hover a player to highlight export partn: Pacelt spēlētāju, lai izceltu eksporta partnerus.
Show a notification when a game is found: Rādīt paziņojumu, kad tiek atrasta spēle
Matches team lobbies with more than 4 pl: Saskaņo komandas vestibilus ar vairāk nekā 4 spēlētājiem uz vienu komandu.
You can turn on all three at the same ti: Var ieslēgt visus trīs vienlaicīgi. Tikai vienam no viņiem ir jāsakrīt.
Default case with no explicit starting g: Noklusētais gadījums bez skaidra starta zelta.
Include requires a match. Exclude blocks: Iekļaut nepieciešama atbilstība. Izslēgt blokus iespēju. Zelta palaišanai pietiek ar jebkuru pievienoto vērtību, bet izslēgtās vērtības vienmēr tiek noraidītas.
Show Mark bot nations red preview: Rādīt marķiera bot nations sarkano priekšskatījumu
analyticsOptInDescription: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Only join lobbies whose max player count: Only join lobbies whose max player count is greater than this number.
You can turn on all four at the same tim: You can turn on all four at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Send a transport with 1% troops, then re: Send a transport with 1% troops, then restore the attack ratio.
Moves alliance requests and renewal prom: Moves alliance requests and renewal prompts into a separate right-side window.
Right-click any tile to send a boat with: Right-click any tile to send a boat with 1% troops, then restores your ratio.
analyticsConsentIntro: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
analyticsConsentTrackedFeatureToggles: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedSummaries: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedVersionLanguage: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
analyticsConsentAnonymousNoGameplay: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
analyticsConsentAnonymousLocalId: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.

Feature toggles, such as which helper wa: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
Coarse usage summaries, such as how many: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
Extension version and language, so issue: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
No OpenFront account, player names, lobb: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
A random local analytics ID is created o: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
analyticsSupportText: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fi: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
